name: OnePlus 8 Pro
notes:
1. Enable 'OEM Unlocking' in Settings > Developer Options before unlocking bootloader.
2. Bootloader unlock WILL wipe all user data — back up first.
3. Flash vbmeta with --disable-verity --disable-verification to allow custom ROMs.
4. After flashing, reboot to recovery to perform a factory reset before first boot.
5. For A/B devices, CyberFlash flashes the inactive slot and then sets it as active.

edl_entry_methods: Method 1 (Key Combo): Power off device. Hold Vol UP + Vol DOWN, then connect USB.
Method 2 (ADB, if partially booting): adb reboot edl
Method 3 (Last Resort - Test Points): Requires device disassembly. Short test points near USB board.
IMPORTANT: OnePlus 8 Pro has a ~10 second EDL window. CyberFlash must be ready before you connect.
